calendar.matters:
Homestead Exemption Declaration
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Kevin S. Eikenberry; 925-933-2161; appearing for Plaintiff and Judgment Creditor Neman Brothers and Associates, Inc.
Toha Quan; Respondent in pro per, appearing own their own behalf.
John Chu; Corporate Counsel Law Group LLP; 415-989-5300; attorney, present.

No appearance by Lucia Quan.

Hearing held. The court notes that Respondent/Declarant Lucia Quan is not present. Attorney John Chu states that he is here to specially appear for Ms. Quan, but is not attorney of record. Respondent Toha Quan states that he does not know why he did not attend the hearing on August 31, 2022. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

LUCIA QUAN'S CLAIM RE: HOMESTEAD EXEMPTION is denied.

Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Order To Show Casue Re: Sale Of Real Property (Ccp 704.750;Ccp 704.770
Off Calendar Aug-31-2022 Text Ruling

ORDER TO SHOW CASUE RE: SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (CCP 704.750; CCP 704.770) is GRANTED as requested. No opposition filed.
